_readme: Download config for `pnpm download`. Each entry is either a DIRECT file URL (.pdf/.xls/.xlsx) or a PAGE url (the downloader auto-discovers file links on it). Files are saved to data/sources/raw/<province>/<year>/ and recorded in manifest.json with their source URL for your verification. URLs below were located on the official sites on 2026-06 and may rotate yearly — replace as needed. After downloading, the raw files still need parsing into the CSV schemas (ask to wire up the xlsx/pdf parser).

sources.note: 河北 2025 物理/历史科目组合 一分一段表 (PDF, 官方 hebeea 文件服务器)
山东 2025 夏季高考文化成绩 一分一段表 (Excel, 官方 sdzk)
山东 2025 各类别分数线 (PDF, 官方 sdzk)
山东 2025 普通类常规批第1次志愿投档情况表 (Excel, 官方 sdzk) — 各院校专业组投档最低分+位次
示例：给一个公告页 URL，下载器会自动发现页内的 .pdf/.xls 链接。可删除或替换为官方 hebeea 公告页。
